additionalInfo.description: Fetches flat threshold keys and Telegram settings from the parent Room Asset.
Compares telemetry data directly with the flat asset thresholds. Handles multiple key name formats (data_LAeq, laeq, LAeq, etc.).
Creates alarm on FIRST threshold breach. Deduplicates — won't re-fire until the alarm clears.
Builds the Telegram sendMessage JSON payload using the matched alerts.
POSTs the message payload to the Telegram Bot API sendMessage endpoint.
